details.message: reports/board/ directory does not exist. Expected top-level directories: src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ — all present except reports/board/ is missing.
reports/board/ directory missing. All other governance contracts present: memory_bank/ has key docs, .cursor/automations/ has README + 5 yaml specs, reports/audit/ exists.

moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code: moltbot/board.py, moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py. Additionally, scripts reference moltbot/clawdbot: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py. These should have been removed per governance policy.
